monitor_the_situation.title: US Launches Extensive Strikes Across Southern Iran

— S4 · Conflict · Bushehr, Iran · 4h ago. U.S. forces strike multiple southern Iranian cities including Bushehr, Chabahar, and Sirik after Trump declares ceasefire over, targeting IRGC bases and oil infrastructure.
Iran Launches Missiles and Drones at Kuwait and Bahrain; Air Defenses Respond
Iran Launches Drone Strikes Targeting US Fifth Fleet in Bahrain, Air Raid Sirens Sound Across Manama

— S4 · Conflict · Manama, Bahrain · 22h ago. Iran has launched drone strikes against Bahrain, targeting the U.S. Fifth Fleet Headquarters, in retaliation for recent U.S. strikes on Iranian military infrastructure.
US Strikes Iranian Air Defense, Ports, and Missile Sites in Major Escalation
